推荐场景: 朋友聊天｜回应对方的感受
60秒任务: 「感受和评价」：故事顺序/原因/感受；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 叙事｜时间顺序｜因果｜转折｜感受评价｜总结
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
How did you feel?（询问感受）
I felt ___ when ___.（表达感受）
It was stressful but useful.（转折评价）
I was happy with ___.（满意）
I was disappointed with ___.（失望）
The best part was ___.（正面评价）
The hardest part was ___.（难点）
It was better than I expected.（超出预期）
It didn’t go as well as planned.（不如预期）
I think it was a good choice.（判断）
It could be improved.（改进）
Overall, ___.（总体评价）
I agree with ___.（同意评价）
I don’t think ___ was fair.（表达不认同）
Let’s talk about what went well.（复盘）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: feeling, choice, result, experience, lesson, feedback, plan, service
Verbs: feel, enjoy, worry, improve, review, agree
Adjectives: happy, tired, nervous, stressed, disappointed
Time / Place: during, after, overall, online
Chunks: best part, hardest part, better than expected, what went well
